title: Skill Installation Workflow
description: Interactive HTML/CSS/JavaScript visualization for skill installation workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
html/css/javascript
learningObjectives: Sequence the eight steps of the Claude skill installation workflow across its four phases: development, installation, discovery, and usage
Explain how symlinks connect a skill's source repository to the skills directory that Claude Code scans
Describe how Claude Code discovers and loads a newly installed skill after the symlink is created
Explain why symlink-based installation keeps skill edits version-controlled in the original git repository
